function.name: SSFC_DAYS_OVER_DUE
function.body:
vRecord RECORD; BEGIN SELECT ps.fin_payment_schedule_id, ps.duedate, MAX(pa.paymentdate) last_payment, ps.outstandingamt, CASE WHEN ps.outstandingamt = 0 THEN CASE WHEN (MAX(pa.paymentdate)::DATE - ps.duedate::DATE) > 0 THEN MAX(pa.paymentdate)::DATE - ps.duedate::DATE ELSE 0 END ELSE CASE WHEN ps.duedate::DATE < now()::DATE THEN now()::DATE - ps.duedate::DATE ELSE 0 END END daysoverdue INTO vRecord FROM fin_payment_schedule ps LEFT JOIN fin_payment_scheduledetail psd ON psd.fin_payment_schedule_invoice = ps.fin_payment_schedule_id LEFT JOIN fin_payment_detail pd ON pd.fin_payment_detail_id = psd.fin_payment_detail_id LEFT JOIN fin_payment pa ON pa.fin_payment_id = pd.fin_payment_id WHERE ps.fin_payment_schedule_id = p_payment_schedule_id GROUP BY ps.fin_payment_schedule_id;
RETURN COALESCE(vRecord.daysoverdue,0); END SSFC_DAYS_OVER_DUE
